channel.title: SevenAtSevenLastSection
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SevenAtSevenLastSection, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.description: A mysterious birthmark, a modern day take on Persuasion, a novel in verse set between life and death, and more of today's best book deals.

item.title: Challenges Await Mamdani as Hopes Rise for Closure of Notorious Rikers Island Jail Complex
item.description: For New York City’s mayor, the hard part isn’t deciding whether or not to shut down Rikers, but figuring out how to do it safely and in a timely way.

item.title: Mother Foucault Bookshop Has The Best Bookstore Name Around. And Now They Bought Their Own Building.
item.description: A bookstore buys its forever home, Dr Abbot reads, and the Leonardo DiCaprio Computer Room at the Los Angeles Public Library.

item.description: From California to New York, juvenile detention systems struggle to protect the youth they house.
